case_title: DARRIELL LOGGINS SR VS. TRITON GLOBAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DARRIELL LOGGINS SR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF INDICATED A REQUEST TO DISMISS W/O PREJUDICE TO ALLOW A CONCURRENT ACTION TO BE FILED IN ALAMEDA COUNTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: GREGORY ALLEN KEEF) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOGGINS SR, DARRIELL AS TO DEFENDANT TRITON GLOBAL SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-28-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; JPT: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
